title: The Era of 1-bit LLMs: All Large Language Models are in 1.58 Bits
summary: Introduced BitNet b1.58, proving ternary weights {-1, 0, 1} match full-precision models while being 2.7x faster and using 3.5x less memory.
impact: End of floating-point dominance. Enables large-scale AI on edge devices.

title: Scalable MatMul-free Language Modeling
summary: Demonstrated the first LLM to eliminate Matrix Multiplication (MatMul) operations across the entire architecture using MLGRU.
impact: Potential 41x energy reduction. Designed for FPGAs and neuromorphic hardware.

title: Addition is All You Need
summary: Introduced L-Mul algorithm to approximate floating-point multiplication using integer addition.
impact: 95% reduction in energy costs for tensor multiplications.

title: Gödel Agent: A Self-Referential Agent Framework
summary: First self-referential agent framework that can analyze and modify its own code recursively.
